summary.intent: Remove the 'Generate Prompts' button from the remediation module and clean up all associated dead code (state, handler, error display).
summary.outcome: Button and associated code were fully removed and verified clean (1351 tests pass, lint clean), but the commit was blocked by a pre-commit TypeScript error unrelated to the change. The commit is pending user decision on how to proceed.

repo: The project uses an `rtk` wrapper prefix for git and shell commands.
Pre-commit hook runs a TypeScript typecheck that fails if generated asset files (`frontend-assets`, `prompts-assets`) are absent — these are only produced by `bun run build`, not by tests or lint.
Test suite has 1351 tests; run via `bun run test`. Lint via `bun run lint`, auto-fix via `bun run lint:fix`.
`setPrompts` is still actively used in RemediateTab.tsx elsewhere, so it was intentionally left in place.

code.finding: `isGenerating` and `generateError` state declarations — removed as dead code after button removal.
`handleGeneratePrompts` useCallback — removed entirely; `generateRemediationPrompts` had no remaining references after cleanup.
Execute button's `disabled` check included `isGenerating` — removed as part of cleanup.
Generate Prompts button (806-812) and `generateError` error display (818-820) — both removed.

workflow: After removing UI state and handlers, always grep for all symbol names independently to avoid leaving stale references.
Run `bun run lint:fix` before committing to catch auto-fixable formatting issues early.
Pre-commit hooks that require build artifacts can block commits for changes unrelated to those artifacts — worth documenting or conditionally skipping typecheck in such cases.

friction: Pre-commit hook TypeScript typecheck fails on missing generated files (`frontend-assets`, `prompts-assets`) that only exist post-build, blocking an otherwise clean commit.
Needed multiple edit passes due to a `isGenerating` symbol appearing in two places (Execute button and the Generate Prompts button itself), requiring careful ordering of edits.
Lint formatting issue surfaced after edits and required a separate `lint:fix` pass.
open_items: Commit is not yet created — user decision required on whether to skip the pre-commit typecheck or run a full build first.
Pre-existing issue: pre-commit hook typecheck fails in a clean checkout without a prior `bun run build` — may warrant fixing the hook or adding generated files to the repo/build pipeline.
